ddls:
CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the article */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date the article was published */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the article */,
  "text" TEXT /* Full text of the article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the article */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author(s) of the article */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Primary location associated with the article */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the article */,
  "word_count" INTEGER /* Number of words in the article */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the article has received */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of times the article has been shared */,
  "comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the article */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the article was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "themes" (
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each theme */,
  "theme_name" TEXT /* Name of the theme */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the theme */,
  "parent_theme_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent theme */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of an icon representing the theme */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("theme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_themes_parent_theme_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_theme_id") REFERENCES themes ("theme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or state where the location is situated */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the entity */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of entity (e.g., person, organization, location) */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the entity */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of an image representing the entity */,
  "entity_group" TEXT /* Group or category of the entity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_themes" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* ID of the theme */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id", "theme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_entities" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity */,
  "relevance_score" REAL /* A score indicating the relevance of the entity to the article */,
  "mention_count" INTEGER /* The number of times the entity is mentioned in the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id", "entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, journalist, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
